lines.text: Tucker here, East Side perimeter, Atwood and Northport. {{ELAPSED}} in and the kill count is sitting at 61 cumulative — that's up 23 from this point last year. We're tracking faster.

There's a helicopter. Been circling overhead for the last eight minutes. No markings I can see. Could be government, could be private security. Nobody's asking questions because the answer probably doesn't matter.

East Side is pulling weight like always — 18 confirmed kills in this sector alone by 22:00. Weapons breakdown is trending bladed, which tracks with what Holden was saying earlier about ammunition costs. Cheaper to use what you have.

The helicopter just adjusted its flight path. Moving south toward the Beltline. Still can't identify it. Trying to get closer, repositioning now to get a better angle on the — hold on, my body-cam GPS just dropped. Recalibrating signal, there's interference from the overpass or —

tickerItems.text: Madison cumulative: 61 ({{ELAPSED}}) | YoY +23 | East Side segment: 18
Unidentified helicopter spotted over East Side and Beltline corridor. Government origin unclear. Continuing to monitor.
Caroline: Temperature holding at 37°F, wind SW 12 mph. Visibility 8 miles. Conditions stable through 23:00.
